site.name: Great Lakescape, LLC
site.tagline: Premium Landscaping in Oakland County, MI

hero.headline: Where Nature's Beauty Meets Our Innovation
hero.subheadline: Great Lakescape is Bloomfield's premier landscaping service — offering full-spectrum outdoor design, installation, and maintenance that transforms your property into a living masterpiece.

about.headline: Bloomfield's Beacon of Landscaping Excellence
paragraphs: Welcome to Great Lakescape — owned and operated by a dynamic team right here in Oakland County. Our innovative approach and meticulous attention to detail have earned us accolades as the area's premier landscaping service.

We specialize in architectural outdoor design-build contracting, offering a full spectrum of services designed to craft functional and breathtaking outdoor living spaces that enrich your life and elevate your home.
Every project we take on is a masterpiece in the making. Experience the Great Lakescape difference.

services.name: Landscaping
services.desc: Complete landscape design and installation tailored to your property and vision.

services.name: Weed Removal
services.desc: Thorough weed extraction from beds, lawns, and hardscape areas to keep your landscape clean.

services.name: Spring / Fall Cleanup
services.desc: Seasonal property cleanup to prep your landscape for summer growth or winter dormancy.

services.name: Mulch Installation
services.desc: Professional mulch application that enriches soil, retains moisture, and polishes every bed.

services.name: Planting
services.desc: Strategic planting of trees, shrubs, perennials, and annuals suited to Michigan's climate.

services.name: Edging
services.desc: Crisp, clean edges along driveways, walkways, and beds for a polished, professional finish.

services.name: Shrub Trimming / Pruning
services.desc: Expert shaping and pruning that promotes healthy growth and maintains curb appeal.

services.name: Tree / Shrub Removal
services.desc: Safe and efficient removal of unwanted trees, shrubs, and stumps from your property.

services.name: Paver Installation
services.desc: Beautiful, durable paver patios, walkways, and driveways installed to last for decades.

services.name: Weed Maintenance
services.desc: Ongoing weed prevention programs to keep your property looking its best all season long.
